## Phase-Gate Checklist (Required)

- [ ] intent alignment is explicit (scope, non-goals, acceptance criteria)
- [ ] spec update completed before implementation
- [ ] failing tests were added first (TDD Red)
- [ ] implementation started after Red tests existed (TDD Green)
- [ ] verification completed (`pnpm test --run`, `pnpm check`)
- [ ] EN/JA usage docs updated when user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] ADR added/updated when architectural or process-level decisions changed
